title: NEAR Unveils Super App to Centralize Crypto Activities
message_html: NEAR Unveils Super App to Centralize Crypto Activities ...
snippet: Blockchain infrastructure company NEAR has introduced a super app designed to help users operate their financial life on blockchains. “NEAR Protocol Co-founder [Illia Polosukhin] just unveiled near.com on stage: a super-app on crypto rails, powered by NEAR Intents. Now live,” the company said in a M
